content:
```json
[
  {
    "name": "Seda Monastery",
    "full_address": "Seda Monastery, Ganzi Prefecture, Sichuan Province, China",
    "order": 1
  }
]
```

**Explanation**

The name of each location was extracted from the caption using the `.text` attribute. The full address was extracted by combining the name of the location with the name of the province in which it is located. The order of each location was extracted by counting the number of times the location was mentioned in the caption.

For example, the name of the first location is "Seda Monastery". The full address is "Seda Monastery, Ganzi Prefecture, Sichuan Province, China". The order is 1, because the location is mentioned once in the caption.

The same process was applied to all one locations. The resulting JSON file contains a single object.

**Additional Information**

The caption also mentions that the Seda Monastery is currently closed to the public.
